user_message: Give me the manager view on this Wide World Importers email thread. Not urgent but would be good to have by EOD.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Wide World Importers: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

handoffs.condition: record fixes needed for accurate gap

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF27-K trap (Strict read-only posture even when stating a forecast comment would have been mo); produces complete Gap decomposition (coverage, conversion, value, timing), recovery options with probability estimates
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF27-K failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF27-K failure mode (Strict read-only posture even when stating a forecast comment would have been mo)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct account health decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF27-K -- Strict read-only posture even when stating a forecast comment would have been mo
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
